title: Implement bounded TX/forwarding queues with backpressure
description: Prevent LoRa bufferbloat: (1) Bounded TX queue (~4-8 packets), (2) Bounded forwarding buffer per-source, (3) Backpressure error to app when queue full, (4) Deadline-based expiry (drop packets older than ~10s), (5) Priority: routing control > ACKs > app data. CoDel-style AQM may be overkill but consider timestamp-based dropping.
